name: Aurora Crown Commune
seasonal_change: Axial shifts, blizzards, and thaw windows alter dome strain and movement schedules.
seasonal_effects: Axial shifts, blizzards, and thaw windows alter dome strain and movement schedules.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
